attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CREATED_BY,CREATED_ON,FULFILLEMENT_TYPE,INTENDED_USE_DESC,
DEAL_ID,PRICE_LIST_NAME,CURRENCY_CODE,QUOTE_ID,
BILL_TO_SITE_ID,QUOTE_NAME,QUOTE_STATUS_DESC,
UPDATED_BY,UPDATED_ON,PARTNER_BE_GEO_ID,
BE_ID,ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID,CR_ID,END_CUSTOMER_NAME,ADDRESS_LINE_1,
CITY,ZIPCODE,COUNTRY,DEAL_STATUS_DESC,
CHANNEL_ACCT_MNGR,OPTY_ID,FEDERAL_FLAG,QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
RECORD_OFFSET,Partition_number,TOPIC_NAME
FROM
(
SELECT       
CREATED_BY,
CAST(CAST(CREATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0 )) AS CREATED_ON,
FULFILLEMENT_TYPE,INTENDED_USE_DESC,
DEAL_ID,PRICE_LIST_NAME,CURRENCY_CODE,QUOTE_ID,
cast(BILL_TO_SITE_ID as bigint) as BILL_TO_SITE_ID,
QUOTE_NAME,QUOTE_STATUS_DESC,
UPDATED_BY,
CAST(CAST(UPDATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS UPDATED_ON,
PARTNER_BE_GEO_ID,--
cast(BE_ID as bigint) as BE_ID,
cast(ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID as int) as ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID,
cast(CR_ID as bigint) as CR_ID,
END_CUSTOMER_NAME,ADDRESS_LINE_1,
CITY,ZIPCODE,COUNTRY,DEAL_STATUS_DESC,
CHANNEL_ACCT_MNGR,OPTY_ID,FEDERAL_FLAG,

TO_DATE(QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE) AS QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE,
CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
RECORD_OFFSET,Partition_number,TOPIC_NAME
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_HEADERS
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY QUOTE_ID ORDER BY CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) DESC)=1
)K
 WHERE DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL 
 AND 
CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0 ))>=Cast('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))

SELECT
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_ON,
FULFILLEMENT_TYPE,
INTENDED_USE_DESC,
DEAL_ID,
PRICE_LIST_NAME,
CURRENCY_CODE,
QUOTE_ID,
BILL_TO_SITE_ID,
QUOTE_NAME,
QUOTE_STATUS_DESC,
UPDATED_BY,
UPDATED_ON,
PARTNER_BE_GEO_ID,
BE_ID,
ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID,
CR_ID,
END_CUSTOMER_NAME,
ADDRESS_LINE_1,
CITY,
ZIPCODE,
COUNTRY,
DEAL_STATUS_DESC,
CHANNEL_ACCT_MNGR,
OPTY_ID,
FEDERAL_FLAG,
QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
TOPIC_NAME
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_HEADERS ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_HEADERS EL
WHERE ST.QUOTE_ID=EL.QUOTE_ID
)
